verseArtPaintings.title: Jesus Wept
verseArtPaintings.description: The shortest verse in the Bible depicting Jesus's compassion and humanity as he mourned Lazarus.

verseArtPaintings.title: Jesus Walking on Water
verseArtPaintings.description: Jesus demonstrates his power over nature as he walks on water toward his disciples.

verseArtPaintings.title: The Prodigal Son
verseArtPaintings.description: A parable of redemption and God's unconditional love for sinners who repent.

verseArtPaintings.title: Feeding the Five Thousand
verseArtPaintings.description: Jesus miraculously feeds thousands with only five loaves and two fish.

verseArtPaintings.title: The Last Supper
verseArtPaintings.description: Jesus's final meal with his disciples before his crucifixion, instituting communion.

verseArtPaintings.title: The Resurrection
verseArtPaintings.description: The angel announces Jesus's resurrection to the women at his empty tomb.

verseArtPaintings.title: Pentecost
verseArtPaintings.description: The Holy Spirit descends upon the apostles in Jerusalem at Pentecost.

verseArtPaintings.title: John's Vision of Christ
verseArtPaintings.description: The apostle John's revelation of the glorified Christ among seven golden lampstands.
